glosses.ja: びくっとする; 飛び上がる

sentences.target: Je sursaute au claquement de la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə syʁsot o klakmɑ̃ də la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je sursaute au claquement de la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə syʁsot o klakmɑ̃ də la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I jump at the door’s slam.
translations.de: Ich schrecke beim Zuschlagen der Tür zusammen.
translations.it: Sussulto al rumore della porta che sbatte.
translations.ko: 문이 쾅 닫히는 소리에 깜짝 놀란다.
translations.zh-Hans: 门砰地一声关上时我吓了一跳。
translations.yue: 聽到門啪一聲閂埋，我嚇一跳。
translations.pt: Eu me assusto com o estrondo da porta.
translations.vi: Tôi giật mình khi cửa sập mạnh.
translations.nl: Ik schrik van het dichtslaan van de deur.
translations.hi: दरवाज़ा ज़ोर से बंद होने पर मैं चौंक जाता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg skvetter av at døra smeller.
translations.sv: Jag rycker till när dörren slår igen.
translations.da: Jeg farer sammen, når døren smækker.
translations.ja: ドアがバタンと閉まる音にびくっとする。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive, denotes a sudden start or flinch; agrees with 'Je'.
Preposition introducing a complement; contraction of 'à + le'; heads the PP 'au claquement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the PP; refers to the sound (here of a door).
Preposition marking a genitive/partitive relation; introduces the noun phrase 'la porte'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu vas sursauter à cause du film.
sentences.reading: /ty va syʁsote a koz dy film/

translations.fr: Tu vas sursauter à cause du film.
translations.ipa: /ty va syʁsote a koz dy film/
translations.en: You're going to jump because of the movie.
translations.es: Vas a sobresaltarte por la película.
translations.de: Du wirst dich wegen des Films erschrecken.
translations.ko: 그 영화 때문에 너 깜짝 놀랄 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你会被这部电影吓一跳。
translations.pt: Você vai se assustar por causa do filme.
translations.vi: Bạn sẽ giật mình vì bộ phim này.
translations.nl: Je gaat schrikken van de film.
translations.hu: A film miatt meg fogsz ijedni.
translations.hi: तुम फ़िल्म की वजह से चौंक जाओगे.
translations.nb: Du kommer til å skvette av filmen.
translations.id: Kamu akan kaget karena film itu.
translations.sv: Du kommer att hoppa till av filmen.
translations.ro: O să tresari din cauza filmului.
translations.da: Du kommer til at fare sammen på grund af filmen.
translations.ja: その映画で君はびくっとするよ。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Auxiliary 'aller' in the present, 2nd person singular; forms the near future with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the auxiliary 'vas' in the near-future construction.
Preposition; here part of the fixed prepositional locution 'à cause de' meaning 'because of'.
Common noun within the locution 'à cause de'; head of the PP that expresses reason.
Preposition introducing the complement; contraction of 'de + le'; links 'cause' to 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de' in the PP 'du film'.

sentences.target: Les enfants sursautent au bruit de l’aspirateur.
sentences.reading: /lez ɑ̃fɑ̃ syʁsot o bʁɥi də laspiʁatœʁ/

translations.fr: Les enfants sursautent au bruit de l’aspirateur.
translations.ipa: /lez ɑ̃fɑ̃ syʁsot o bʁɥi də laspiʁatœʁ/
translations.en: The kids jump at the sound of the vacuum.
translations.es: Los niños se sobresaltan con el ruido de la aspiradora.
translations.de: Die Kinder zucken beim Geräusch des Staubsaugers zusammen.
translations.it: I bambini sobbalzano al rumore dell’aspirapolvere.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们一听到吸尘器的声音就会吓一跳。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友聽到吸塵機嘅聲就會嚇一跳。
translations.pt: As crianças se assustam com o barulho do aspirador.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ giật mình vì tiếng máy hút bụi.
translations.ar: الأطفال يفزعون من صوت المكنسة الكهربائية.
translations.nl: De kinderen schrikken van het geluid van de stofzuiger.
translations.hu: A gyerekek megijednek a porszívó hangjától.
translations.hi: बच्चे वैक्यूम क्लीनर की आवाज़ से चौंक जाते हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci wzdrygają się na dźwięk odkurzacza.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά τρομάζουν από τον ήχο της ηλεκτρικής σκούπας.
translations.nb: Barna skvetter av lyden fra støvsugeren.
translations.id: Anak-anak kaget dengan suara penyedot debu.
translations.sv: Barnen rycker till av ljudet från dammsugaren.
translations.da: Børnene farer sammen ved lyden af støvsugeren.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは掃除機の音にびくっとする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner of 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person plural; intransitive, agrees with 'Les enfants'.
Preposition introducing a complement; contraction of 'à + le'; heads the PP 'au bruit'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the PP; denotes the sound.
Preposition marking a genitive/partitive relation; introduces the following noun phrase.
Definite article elided before a vowel-initial noun; determines 'aspirateur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'de' in 'de l’aspirateur'.

sentences.target: On sursaute à chaque coup de tonnerre.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ syʁsot a ʃak ku də tɔnɛʁ/

translations.fr: On sursaute à chaque coup de tonnerre.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ syʁsot a ʃak ku də tɔnɛʁ/
translations.en: We jump at every clap of thunder.
translations.de: Wir zucken bei jedem Donnerschlag zusammen.
translations.ko: 천둥이 칠 때마다 우리는 깜짝 놀란다.
translations.zh-Hans: 每次打雷我们都会吓一跳。
translations.yue: 我哋每次打雷都會嚇一跳。
translations.ru: Мы вздрагиваем при каждом раскате грома.
translations.pt: Nós nos assustamos a cada trovão.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi giật mình mỗi lần có tiếng sấm.
translations.uk: Ми здригаємося від кожного удару грому.
translations.hi: हर गड़गड़ाहट पर हम चौंक जाते हैं.
translations.id: Kami kaget setiap kali terdengar guntur.
translations.sv: Vi rycker till vid varje åskknall.
translations.ro: Tresărim la fiecare bubuit de tunet.
translations.da: Vi farer sammen ved hvert tordenskrald.
translations.ja: 雷鳴がするたびに私たちはびくっとする。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/generic subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Preposition introducing the circumstantial complement.
Distributive determiner; modifies 'coup'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'chaque coup'; here denotes a single strike/clap.
Preposition linking 'coup' to 'tonnerre' (compound meaning 'thunderclap').
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'de' in 'coup de tonnerre'.
